SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.party.impl

Class ViewPartyPerformanceMetrics

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.party.impl.ViewPartyPerformanceMetrics
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable
@Entity(name="ViewPartyPerformanceMetrics") public class ViewPartyPerformanceMetrics extends java.lang.Object implements java.io.Serializable
JPA entity for view_party_performance_metrics database view. Intelligence Purpose: Comprehensive party performance indicators combining member counts, voting records, document production, violations, and government representation. Calculates an overall performance score based on multiple factors. Created by: Database schema v1.0+ Risk Rules Supported: Pa-01 through Pa-10 (All party-level effectiveness rules) Provides snapshot metrics for party benchmarking and comparative analysis
See Also:

    Instantiates a new view party performance metrics.
